sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Clinical Workforce Mix Optimisation (FTE vs. Agency Nursing & Locum Doctors)
condition_precedents: Clinical staffing ratio analysis completed (FTE vs. agency ratio by department and shift)
Agency nursing cost benchmarked vs. full-time equivalent cost including benefits
HR and clinical leadership sign-off on optimised staffing model (patient safety maintained)

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Medical Supplies & Implant Cost Optimisation (GPO vs. Direct Sourcing)
condition_precedents: Medical supplies spend classified by category (consumables, implants, reagents, pharmaceuticals)
GPO membership evaluated vs. direct contract savings for top 10 categories by spend
Clinician preference item (CPI) committee established — physician engagement on implant standardisation

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Pharmacy Cost Optimisation (Formulary Management & Generic Substitution)
condition_precedents: Formulary committee established with clinical pharmacy leadership
Generic substitution rate benchmarked vs. hospital peer group (target > 70%)
Prescriber behaviour analytics deployed — high branded prescribers identified and coached

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Revenue Cycle Management Automation (Denial Management & Pre-Auth)
condition_precedents: Denial rate benchmarked by payer and denial reason (target < 5% first-pass denial)
Pre-authorisation workflow mapped and automated triggers configured
Revenue cycle platform selected (Athena, Epic Resolute, or equivalent)

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Clinical Space Utilisation (OT, ICU & Bed Occupancy Optimisation)
condition_precedents: OT utilisation data available (target > 75% first-case on-time starts)
Bed occupancy tracking system deployed (ADT system with real-time census)
Theatre scheduling optimisation model implemented — case sequencing and block booking

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Medical Equipment Asset Optimisation (Lease vs. Buy & Maintenance Cost)
condition_precedents: Medical equipment asset register updated with utilisation data (target > 65% utilisation)
Lease vs. buy TCO analysis completed for high-value equipment (CT, MRI, linear accelerators)
Preventive maintenance programme optimised — OEM vs. independent service provider benchmarked
